mapper.update:
update cmp_bankreconciliation
receiptassociation = 0 ,
ytenant_id = #{ytenant_id} and id in
#{item}

update cmp_bankelectronicreceipt
receiptassociation = 0 ,
ytenant_id = #{ytenant_id} and id in
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT id,bankaccount,tran_date,tran_time,tran_amt,dc_flag,bank_seq_no,to_acct_no,to_acct_name from cmp_bankreconciliation where concat_info is null limit 20000;
mapper.update:
update cmp_bankreconciliation set virtualentrytype = #{virtualentrytype},pubts=pubts
id = #{id} and (virtualentrytype != #{virtualentrytype} or virtualentrytype is null)
mapper.select: SELECT id,enterprisebankaccount,trandate,trantime,tran_amt,dc_flag,bankseqno,to_acct_no,to_acct_name from cmp_bankdealdetail where concat_info is null limit 20000;
